title: Leave This, GoBack!
description: Pressing on a slot twice returns you back to the previous slot. Useful for attribute swapping / quick tool swapping / mace pvp
body:
# Leave This, GoBack!

A simple mod that lets you go back to the previous slot after clicking on the same slot twice. No more messy keyboard smashes!

### FOR THE LATEST VERSION USE [TUTLA CLIENT](https://modrinth.com/mod/tutla-client)

---

### Basic Usage
```python
- Press 1: Switches to Hotbar Slot 1
- Press 2: Switches to Hotbar Slot 2
- Press 2 (again): Switches BACK to Hotbar Slot 1
```
As you see **Leave This (slot), GoBack (to the previous slot)!**

### Chaining

```python
- Press 1: Switches to Hotbar Slot 1
- Press 2: Switches to Hotbar Slot 2
- Press 2 (again): Switches BACK to Hotbar Slot 1
- Press 2 (again): Switches BACK to Hotbar Slot 2
- Press 2 (again): Switches BACK to Hotbar Slot 1
(repeats on and on)
```

**What makes it so special?**
-> __"Chaining" can help beginners learn to attribute swap__, instead of searching your keyboard for a different slot or getting used to the movement you can just- `1` -> `2` -> `LEFT CLICK` -> `1` -> `1` -> `LEFT CLICK` -> `1` -> `1` -> `LEFT CLICK`-> `1` -> `1` -> `LEFT CLICK`
(assuming you have a *sword* in `slot 1` and *mace* in `slot 2`)

---
**DISCLAIMER: THIS IS __NOT__ A CHEAT. IT INSTEAD MAKES SWAPPING SIMPLE. THE USER STILL HAS TO PERFORM THE ACTION**

### Similar Mods & Other Projects by *Tutla*
- [LeaveBind](https://modrinth.com/mod/leavebind): Leave the server in a keybind
- [Spoofer+](https://modrinth.com/mod/spoofer+): Spoof your mod list and f3 menu
- [Manhunt+](https://modrinth.com/plugin/manhunt+): Best Manhunt plugin!
